title: Keezh Vaanam Sivakkum
subTitle: Kumaran, who is blind, gets attached with his eye doctor's daughter-in-law. However, he is shocked to learn that the man responsible for his sister's death is none other than the doctor's son.

title: Michael Madana Kama Rajan
subTitle: A wicked man separates a set of quadruplets after their birth, while one of them ends up with their biological father, the other three find new homes. However, chaos ensues when they cross paths.

title: Ninaithaley Inikkum
subTitle: An energetic young woman Bommi captures the hearts of a sweet-making royal family. Her confident belief system plays a titular role in keeping the family together.

title: Oru Kai Parpom
subTitle: Jayaraman, a petty thief, changes his ways when he meets a rich lady who is mentally ill and decides to work as her bodyguard.

title: Periyanna
subTitle: While teaching music to a district collector's daughter, a prisoner falls in love with her. Afraid of getting caught, the lovers elope to a village and befriend the village chief, who helps them out.

title: Iniyavalae Vaa
subTitle: To fulfil his father's wish, Prabhu marries Sakuntala. However, troubles begin to surface when Prabhu's close association with Rekha, a married woman, causes hindrance between Prabhu and Sakuntala.

title: Vanaja Girija
subTitle: Sisters Vanaja and Girija believe they were abandoned by their father due to the influence of a man named Ramanathan. The duo vow to alienate Ramanathan from his family as he did to theirs.

title: Sakthi Leelai
subTitle: Sage Bhringi worships only Lord Shiva, Brahma and Vishnu. When Goddess Parvati stands in his way, he goes to the extent of giving rise to a demon.

title: Naalaiya Theerpu
subTitle: Arun, who has many extra-marital affairs, molests his wife, Mahalakshmi. However, things take an unexpected turn when she gets pregnant and has a son.
